title: Electron Correlation: Beyond the Mean Field
description: Understand why single-determinant methods fail to capture the full physics of interacting electrons, and learn the hierarchy of methods that recover electron correlation energy.
learningObjectives: Explain why Hartree-Fock is missing electron correlation
Distinguish between dynamic and static correlation
Understand the hierarchy of post-Hartree-Fock methods
Appreciate the computational cost of correlation methods
Connect correlation to quantum computing advantages
